description_long: This is a retail package of Faragello Frozen Peas, presented in a sealed, rectangular plastic bag. The front of the package features a vibrant image of green peas in a bowl, with the Faragello brand logo prominently displayed in red and white at the top. The background is mostly white with scattered green peas and pea pods as decorative elements. The back of the package contains multilingual product information, a nutrition facts panel, and various symbols, all printed in black and colored text. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the continuation of the pea pod graphics and some text. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a grocery or urban food retail setting.
description: A sealed white plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Peas with a colorful front image of peas and clear branding, plus detailed product and nutrition information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, a bowl of green peas, and decorative pea graphics on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the bag with partial graphics and some text visible.
description_view_2: Back view featuring product information in multiple languages, a nutrition facts panel, and various symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other narrow edge with partial graphics and minimal text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, consisting of a red rectangular background with white text and a stylized 'F' above the name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows a bowl of green peas and the text 'Frozen Peas' in English and Arabic, indicating the flavor is plain green peas.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information in a standard table format.
